description.unified: Drops 5 lightning bolts upon a random enemy, dealing M.DMG and inflicting Electrify. Electrified enemy is stunned for [2 sec->3 sec].
HP of all allies is healed by ??? for [6 sec->5 sec]. For the duration of Skill, Kaulah [ (added) gains immunity to CC] and takes [60% reduced Magic DMG -> 50% reducesd All DMG].
For 15 sec, increases all allies' ATK by ???, ATK Spd by [42%->350], and Crit Chance by [150->350].

Deals M.DMG to 4 enemies every 15 sec, inflicting them with Electric shock for 20 sec, and inflicting stun for [0.6 sec->1 sec] upon a Critical Hit. Enemies inflicted with Electric Shock take a total of M.DMG over 20 sec. For every enemy under Electric, Kaulah takes 15% reduced DMG. This effect can be stacked up to max 3 times and is irremovable.

dark.unified: Target takes 25% increased M.DMG for 10 sec.

light.unified: Allies take 25% less DMG while skill is in effect.

dark.unified: In exchange for [1000->1] additional Mana Cost, additionally heal allies by 5% of their Max HP.

light.unified: Recovers 1 orb of Mana for all allies.

description.unified: [Swift Wind] Mana cost is reduced by 1, and Crit DMG {0}% boost effect is added.

dark.unified: When taking DMG, decreases ATK Spd of the attacking enemy by [200%->300] for 5 sec and its Mana by [100->200] every sec. This effect is activated only once every 5 sec.

description.unified: Normal attacks have a [{0}%->{0}%] chance to deal M.DMG equal to [{0}%->{1}%] of ATK and inflicts against 2 random enemies and reduce their ATK by [{1}%->{2}%]. If the target is already inflicted with Electric Shock, stuns the target for [0.5 sec->2 sec].

Summons the soul of The Bluewind, Coventina, recovering Mana of all allies by [ (removed) {1} -> 2000]. Afterward, reduces Heal Rate of all enemies by 30%, [(added) increase M.DMG the enemies take by 30% for 10 sec], and attacks a random enemy with lightning every 3 sec, [(added) dispelling positive effects], dealing M.DMG, [(added) and reducing the enemy's Mana by 500]. After 10 sec, deals M.DMG to all enemies and [dispels positive effects->inflicts Stun for 5 sec].

1.to: Changes Heal Rate Reduction effect to 50% and M.DMG Boost effect to 50%.
1.unified: Changes Heal Rate Reduction effect to 50% and M.DMG Boost effect to 50%.

2.from: Increases DEF Penetration of all allies by {1} for the duration of Skill.
2.to: Increases DEF Penetration of all allies by 500 for the duration of Skill.
2.unified: Increases DEF Penetration of all allies by [ (removed) {1} -> 500] for the duration of Skill.
